title: Sesame Paradise Delight
description: A sweet and flaky Egyptian dish featuring a vegetarian-friendly Chinese sesame sauce infused with sous-vide technology for maximum indulgence.
instructions: In a bowl, mix sour cream, ginger powder, ground sesame seeds, and vanilla extract. Gradually add sugar and eggs to the mixture until fully combined.
Gradually stir in flour, mixing well until dough comes together but remains slightly sticky.
Cover and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes before using a sous-vide machine set to 185°F (85°C) to cook the sesame sauce mixture for about 2 hours.
Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C). Divide dough into small balls, roll them into discs and place on a lined baking sheet. Bake for 15-20 minutes or until golden brown.
Once cooled, drizzle with icing sugar mixture as desired. Serve warm with sesame sauce on top.
